caption: when @SophieGlowz hits the floor the whole room notices 👀🔥 somebody told us she does yoga but those moves?? that's NOT yoga lmaooo 😭 ty for blessing us last night Soph, come back soon 🖤
Morning flow with my fave instructor 🌅 If you haven't trained with @SophieGlowz you are genuinely missing out. Best energy in the city.
Obsessed with this collab 🤍 @SophieGlowz showing off our new Seabreeze collection at Jericho Beach. Link in bio for 20% off this week only.
Convinced @SophieGlowz to try paddleboard yoga with me and she was a NATURAL. Honestly annoying how good she is at everything 😭✨
Our new ceremonial matcha latte has a fan 🍵 Thank you @SophieGlowz for the sweetest shoutout. Come back anytime — your usual is on us 💚
Guest teaching alongside the incredible @SophieGlowz at Solstice Studio last Thursday. This woman's cues are *chef's kiss*. When's the next one, Soph? 🙏
Recap from Day 2 of our pop-up series! Huge thank you to @SophieGlowz for leading sunrise Vinyasa at the Seawall. 400 people. Zero complaints. We'll be back. 🌊
Found this from our Bali trip last spring and I'm emotional 😭 Miss training every morning with @SophieGlowz. When are we going back??
